product_overview: Hidden Depths is a modern digital sanctuary providing mental clarity through anonymity and focused mentoring. It delivers an immersive experience via dynamic WebGL visuals, calming ambient audio, and a secure, professional booking system limited to Sundays and Mondays.
core_goals: Create a serene and immersive environment using advanced WebGL 3D visuals and ambient sound to improve user focus and mental clarity.
Implement a smart and secure booking system allowing users to schedule mentoring sessions exclusively on Sundays and Mondays.
Integrate seamless payment processing using Razorpay ensuring secure transactions with automated email confirmations.
Enable a Progressive Web App experience for offline use and native app installation on mobile devices.
Optimize performance by tiered graphics rendering to maintain 60fps across a wide range of devices from budget Androids to high-end iPhones.
key_features: Immersive Atmosphere with custom Voronoi fluid shaders (CausticOcean) and ambient audio to create a calming full-screen environment.
Circadian Rhythm based automatic theme transitions adapting to user local time (Morning Light and Abyssal Night themes).
Professional Booking Engine supporting smart scheduling, double-booking protection via Supabase, payment integration with Razorpay, and automated booking confirmation emails through EmailJS.
Admin panel featuring JWT-based authentication, booking management, meeting link addition, and analytics insights.
PWA readiness with installable app capability and offline support.
Performance optimization supporting tiered graphics rendering for smooth 60fps user experience.
user_flow_summary: Landing Experience: User visits the immersive landing page that auto-applies time-based theme, shows calming 3D visuals, and optionally plays ambient audio.

Booking Flow: User initiates booking, views available slots on Sundays and Mondays, selects a date/time, enters contact info, proceeds with Razorpay payment, then receives booking confirmation email and booking is recorded in Supabase.
Admin Flow: Admin logs in via JWT, accesses booking dashboard, manages booking statuses, adds meeting links for confirmed bookings, and views analytics and insights.
validation_criteria: Booking creation restricted to Sundays and Mondays with enforced no double-booking through database locking.
Successful payment processing via Razorpay before confirming bookings.
Email confirmation sent automatically upon successful booking via EmailJS.
JWT authentication enforced for all protected/admin API routes.
PWA installation and offline capabilities functioning across supported devices.
Performance metrics meeting 60fps rendering target on tested device tiers.
Security requirements met, including CORS restrictions, input validation, rate limiting on booking creation, and Razorpay key separation for test/live environments.

features.name: Booking System
features.description: Handles appointment scheduling on Sundays and Mondays.

features.name: Payment System
features.description: Razorpay order creation and signature verification.
